sourceMap.item: LNG imports by country, volume and value
sourceMap.balanceUse: LNG import supply and supplier mix
sourceMap.source: Japan Customs / Ministry of Finance Trade Statistics
sourceMap.pull: Monthly Commodity by Country import table; HS 271111000 = liquefied natural gas. Quantity is Customs CSV Unit2; value is JPY1000 per Customs notes.

sourceMap.item: City gas production, purchases, sales and inventories

sourceMap.pull: Monthly Excel files from the statistics table list.

sourceMap.item: Power-sector LNG receipts, burn and stocks
sourceMap.balanceUse: Power LNG demand and utility inventory
sourceMap.source: METI / ANRE Electric Power Survey Statistics
sourceMap.pull: Monthly thermal power fuel statistics Excel table; LNG fuel consumption/receipts/stocks where reported.

sourceMap.balanceUse: Published sanity check for total, city-gas and power LNG inventories
sourceMap.source: JOGMEC Natural Gas & LNG related information
sourceMap.pull: Monthly Japan inventory commentary compiled from METI Gas Business and Thermal Power Generation Statistics.

sourceGaps.note: METI Gas Business monthly Excel source is identified, but the Excel parser is not wired yet. Values stay blank until parsed from the official workbook.

sourceGaps.item: Power-sector LNG burn, receipts and stocks
sourceGaps.note: METI Electric Power Survey fuel statistics source is identified, but not parsed yet. No gas-for-power or power inventory values are estimated.
JOGMEC publishes inventory commentary compiled from METI Gas Business and Thermal Power Generation Statistics. Use as cross-check, not invented weekly stock.

capacityReference.source: World Nuclear Association + JAIF Japan NPPs in Operation
capacityReference.note: Utilization uses Ember monthly TWh divided by restarted/reactor-returned capacity. Units still under restart review are excluded until proper commercial restart; restarted units that are idle, offline, under maintenance, or not producing remain in the denominator.

weather.note: Numeric city forecast is Open-Meteo. JMA long-range page is linked as official source until a stable JMA JSON feed is wired.
